message.content:
@startuml
title 登录验证

hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 10
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #777777
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  ActorBorderColor #777777
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F2
  ArrowColor #222222
  MessageAlign left
}

participant "WEB" as WEB
participant "API" as API
participant "PMS" as PMS
participant "Cache" as Cache
database "Redis" as Redis

== 登录验证 ==

WEB -> API : 登录请求，用户名密码
API -> PMS : 验证
PMS --> API : 验证完成，返回GUID
API -> Cache : 缓存信息
API -> Redis : 如果开启,向redis存储数据
API --> WEB : 返回登录信息 access_token(guid)

== 访问后台接口 ==

WEB -> API : SET HTTP HEADER "Authorization: Bearer access_token"
API -> Cache : 从缓存读取，验证
Cache --> API : 返回
API -> Redis : 如果开启，Cache没有从redis读取
Redis --> API : 返回
API -> API : 验证有效
API --> WEB : 失败，http code 401

@enduml
